creator: me@int19h.org
text:
Created attachment 195805
Port

Kiwix is an offline reader for web content archived in ZIM format. It is
particularly tailored towards Wikipedia and other wikis.

kiwix-tools contains command-line Kiwix tools: a local HTTP server to serve
content, and a set of tools to manage ZIM files.

See http://www.kiwix.org/ for more information.

This port depends on kiwix-lib (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=230315)
